hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q '"gh pr create' && [ ! -f .claude/pr-review-done.flag ] && echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Pre-PR checklist required: (1) run /review and fix all findings, (2) run /tech-debt and fix all issues, (3) touch .claude/pr-review-done.flag, (4) retry."}'; exit 0
INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q '"gh pr create' && rm -f .claude/pr-review-done.flag 2>/dev/null; exit 0
